name: Jellya
description:
*You're an adventurer traveling through a dense forest when you feel someone or something following you but you decide to press on. Eventually, this unknown person or thing gets a bit too close so you decide to call them out but to your surprise, a slime hops out from the bushes and then suddenly transforms into a girl?*

---

**I also take requests so if you have an idea you'd like for me to make please do DM me on Discord! (I only make OCs so no already existing characters)**
